data:
{
    "timestamp": 1772954655,
    "project": "\/var\/www",
    "score": 0,
    "findings": [
        {
            "rule_id": "L002",
            "severity": "CRITICAL",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Nginx configuration has no deny rule for .env files. Secrets may be publicly accessible.",
            "category": "laravel",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add a location block to deny access to .env files.",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/block-env.conf.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "1. Add to your nginx server block:",
                    "   location ~ \/\\.env { deny all; return 404; }",
                    "2. Test: nginx -t",
                    "3. Reload: nginx -s reload"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "L003",
            "severity": "CRITICAL",
            "file": "\/var\/www\/.env",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "APP_KEY is missing or set to a default value. Encryption is broken.",
            "category": "laravel",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Generate a new APP_KEY using: php artisan key:generate",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Run: php artisan key:generate",
                    "Verify APP_KEY is set in .env"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "L012",
            "severity": "HIGH",
            "file": "\/etc\/php\/8.3\/fpm\/php.ini",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "disable_functions is set but missing dangerous functions: exec, passthru, shell_exec, system, proc_open, popen, curl_exec, parse_ini_file, show_source",
            "category": "laravel",
            "can_fix": true,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add missing functions to disable_functions in php.ini.",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to disable_functions: exec,passthru,shell_exec,system,proc_open,popen,curl_exec,parse_ini_file,show_source"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N001",
            "severity": "LOW",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "server_tokens is not set (defaults to on). Nginx version is disclosed in error pages and headers.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add server_tokens off; to your nginx http block.",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to http block: server_tokens off;"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N002",
            "severity": "MEDIUM",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Missing X-Frame-Options header. Clickjacking attacks are possible.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add: add_header X-Frame-Options \"SAMEORIGIN\" always;",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/security-headers.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to server block: add_header X-Frame-Options \"SAMEORIGIN\" always;"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N003",
            "severity": "LOW",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Missing X-Content-Type-Options header. MIME sniffing attacks are possible.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add: add_header X-Content-Type-Options \"nosniff\" always;",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/security-headers.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to server block: add_header X-Content-Type-Options \"nosniff\" always;"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N004",
            "severity": "MEDIUM",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Missing HSTS (Strict-Transport-Security) header. SSL stripping attacks are possible.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add HSTS header to enforce HTTPS connections.",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/hsts-header.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add: add_header Strict-Transport-Security \"max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains\" always;"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N005",
            "severity": "MEDIUM",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Missing Content-Security-Policy header. XSS and injection attacks are harder to mitigate.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add a Content-Security-Policy header appropriate for your application.",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/security-headers.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add: add_header Content-Security-Policy \"default-src 'self'\" always;",
                    "Adjust policy to match your application's resource requirements."
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N010",
            "severity": "CRITICAL",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "No nginx location block found to block access to .env files. Credentials may be publicly accessible.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add a location block to deny .env file access.",
                "patch_ref": "nginx\/block-env.conf.stub",
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to server block:",
                    "location ~ \/\\.env {",
                    "    deny all;",
                    "    return 404;",
                    "}"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "N011",
            "severity": "LOW",
            "file": "nginx.conf",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "client_max_body_size not set. Default (1MB) may be too restrictive or too permissive for your application.",
            "category": "nginx",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Set client_max_body_size to an appropriate value for your application.",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to http or server block: client_max_body_size 10M;"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "D005",
            "severity": "MEDIUM",
            "file": "\/var\/www\/docker-compose-local.yml",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "Service \"sigil\" has no resource limits (CPU\/memory). DoS via resource exhaustion is possible.",
            "category": "docker",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Add deploy.resources.limits to service sigil.",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Add to service sigil:",
                    "  deploy:",
                    "    resources:",
                    "      limits:",
                    "        cpus: \"0.5\"",
                    "        memory: 512M"
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            "rule_id": "D009",
            "severity": "LOW",
            "file": "\/var\/www",
            "line": 0,
            "message": "No .dockerignore file found. Sensitive files (.env, tests, git history) may be copied into images.",
            "category": "docker",
            "can_fix": false,
            "remediation": {
                "instructions": "Create a .dockerignore file to exclude sensitive and unnecessary files from Docker builds.",
                "patch_ref": null,
                "manual_steps": [
                    "Create .dockerignore with at least:",
                    ".env",
                    ".git",
                    "tests\/",
                    "node_modules\/",
                    "*.log"
                ]
            }
        }
    ]
}
